beta.message: This is a pre-release build intended for invited testers only. Features may be incomplete, unstable, or subject to breaking changes. Do not use in production environments.

settings.title: Settings
settings.verbose_desc: Pass --verbose to all tsuki CLI commands. Shows full compiler output in the terminal.
settings.autoSave_desc: Save all modified files automatically before running Check / Build / Flash.
settings.gitInit_desc: Run git init + initial commit when creating a new project (requires git in PATH).
settings.appearance_desc: Customise the IDE's colour scheme, syntax colours, and interface scale.
settings.uiScale_desc: Scales all interface elements proportionally. Editor font size is controlled separately in the Editor tab.
settings.fontSmoothing_desc: Controls how fonts are anti-aliased. If text looks blurry or too thin, try 'Crisp' or 'Subpixel'.
settings.tools_desc: Paths to external binaries used for building and flashing.
settings.tsukiPath_desc: Path to the tsuki CLI. Leave blank to use the one found in your PATH.
settings.board_desc: Hardware defaults and C++ standard used during compilation.
settings.exp_desc: Opt in to early-access features. These may change or be removed without notice.
settings.exp_master_desc: Global toggle — disabling this hides all experimental UI regardless of individual flags.
settings.exp_sandbox_desc: Live Arduino circuit simulator with visual pin state, integrated waveform viewer, and breakpoint debugging. Early alpha — layout and API may change.
settings.exp_git_desc: Source control panel with staged/unstaged changes, commit history graph, and basic push/pull operations. Requires git in PATH.
settings.exp_git_resources: Runs git commands as subprocesses. No background polling — commands execute on demand only.
settings.exp_sandbox_resources: Runs a WASM simulation engine. May consume extra CPU/memory during active simulation.
settings.exp_git_warning: ⚠ Push / pull not yet supported — local operations only.
settings.exp_git_req_git: git must be available in your PATH
settings.lang_desc: Choose the display language for the IDE interface. Language packs are bundled with the application.
settings.lang_restart_hint: Some labels may require restarting the IDE to update fully.
